visuals.title: Page Replacement Process Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Page Replacement Process Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Page Replacement Algorithms</text>
  
  <!-- Memory Frames -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="60" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="120" y="60" width="60" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="190" y="60" width="60" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="260" y="60" width="60" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Frame 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="150" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Frame 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="220" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Frame 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="290" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Frame 4
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Page References -->
  <rect x="50" y="120" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="100" y="120" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="150" y="120" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="200" y="120" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="250" y="120" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="300" y="120" width="40" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="70" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    5
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="120" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="170" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="220" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    5
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="270" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    4
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="320" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Algorithm Labels -->
  <rect x="50" y="180" width="100" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="160" y="180" width="100" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="270" y="180" width="100" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    FIFO
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    LRU
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="320" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    OPTIMAL
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Page Fault Indicator -->
  <circle cx="350" y="250" r="15" fill="#F44336" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="350" y="254" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    PF
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="350" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Page Fault
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow showing replacement -->
  <line x1="200" y1="100" x2="200" y2="130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <polygon points="200,130 195,125 205,125" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <text x="220" y="115" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Replace
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
